abilities.name: Better Part of Valor
abilities.description: Walk increased by +2, but no Charge Aspect.

abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.description: Cannot be targeted by Charge Action.

abilities.name: Distracting Presence
abilities.description: Enemy characters within a5 ignore suit associations from Skills, cannot take Defensive Stance or Focus Actions.

abilities.name: Don't Mind Me (11)
abilities.description: If this character did not take offensive actions last turn, enemies must succeed TN 11 Scrutiny Challenge or choose different target.

actions: (1) Incessant Questioning (Bewitch) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 5 | Resist: Wp | Target becomes Slow and Dazed until start of next turn.

(1) Flash Photography (Notice) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 5 | Resist: Wp | Target becomes Blind until start of next turn. Capacity 1, Reload 1. Ram Hey Look Over Here: Every character within p1 also becomes Blind.
system.notes: Guild-affiliated reporters gathering information unobtrusively. Work for Malifaux Daily Record or Malifaux Tattler newspapers.
